ham.subject: Re: Project Update – Out of Office
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I wanted to let you know that I will be out of the office from Monday, 8 April until Friday, 12 April. During this period I will have limited access to email.

If you need immediate assistance with the project timeline or any pending tasks, please reach out to Jane Doe (jane.doe@company.com) or John Smith (john.smith@company.com).

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,

Alex Johnson
Senior Analyst

spam.subject: URGENT: Scholarship Verification Required – Immediate Action Needed
spam.body:
Dear Student,

Congratulations! You have been shortlisted for the prestigious Global Scholars Fellowship Award of $10,000. In order to complete the award process, our records show that your application requires verification of your academic credentials.

Please provide the following information within 48 hours:
1. Full name and date of birth
2. Current university and program
3. Official transcript (PDF)
4. Contact phone number

To verify your eligibility, click the link below:
<URL>

Failure to submit this information will result in disqualification from the award.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

Dr. Emily Carter
Director, Global Scholars Office
University of Excellence
